CREATE TABLE linestring_test (id Int32, geometry String);
SELECT readWKTLineString(geometry) FROM linestring_test WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE more_linestrings (id Int32, geometry String);
SELECT id, readWKTLineString(geometry) AS geom FROM more_linestrings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM more_linestrings WHERE geometry LIKE 'LINESTRING%');
CREATE TABLE nested_linestring_test AS SELECT id, readWKTLineString(geometry) AS geom FROM more_linestrings;
SELECT id, geom FROM nested_linestring_test WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT g1.id, g1.geom, g2.geom FROM nested_linestring_test AS g1 JOIN nested_linestring_test AS g2 ON g1.id <> g2.id;
SELECT id, readWKTLineString(geometry) FROM linestring_test WHERE geometry = 'LINESTRING (10 10, 20 20, 30 30)';
SELECT readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (2 3, 4 5)') AS geom UNION ALL SELECT readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (6 7, 8 9)') AS geom;
